verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here I am again just looking For the words that help me say that My heart is full of love and praises I must have prayed a thousand prayers And sung a hunderd songs but I just have to say again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh How I love You More than words can say In the deepest heartfelt way Oh How, Lord I love You Once again receive my praise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So many words, So many songs So many melodies yet Allow me one more declaration You are the lover of my soul The center of my life So I just have to say again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: bridge Thank you for a brand new day, A brand new chance to stand and say I love You I love you Thank you for a brand new day, A brand new chance to stand and say I love You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Help me find the words to say That tell You in a brand new way I love you Oh, how I love you Help me find the words to say That tell You in a brand new way I love you
